final_decision.exact_quote: If you already have activities scheduled during this time, reschedule them outside the maintenance window to prevent disruption.
final_decision.justification: [ACTION_REQUEST] grounded generation; retrieval_score=0.74; verifier=pass; product_area_snapped=account management->screen
final_decision.response: To delete your HackerRank account, you will need to follow these steps: 1. Log in to your HackerRank account. 2. Go to your account settings. 3. Look for the option to delete your account. If you do not see this option, you may need to contact support for further assistance. Please note that you cannot delete your account directly if you signed up using Google login without a password. In that case, you will need to reach out to support for help.

input.exact_quote: If you already have activities scheduled during this time, reschedule them outside the maintenance window to prevent disruption.
input.response: To delete your HackerRank account, you will need to follow these steps: 1. Log in to your HackerRank account. 2. Go to your account settings. 3. Look for the option to delete your account. If you do not see this option, you may need to contact support for further assistance. Please note that you cannot delete your account directly if you signed up using Google login without a password. In that case, you will need to reach out to support for help.
